ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Type of work classification */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight used for income estimation */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number representing education level (e.g., years of education) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains earned by the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses incurred by the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income bracket of the individual (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the individual works in */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the current field */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., salary, investment, self-employment) */,
  "additional_income" TEXT /* Additional income sources */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the individual */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "education_field" TEXT /* Field of education */,
  "highest_degree_year" INTEGER /* Year the highest degree was obtained */,
  "language_proficiency" TEXT /* Language proficiency of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclass_types ("workclass_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sexes ("gender")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data record */,
  "raw_prediction" TEXT /* Raw prediction values from the model */,
  "probability" TEXT /* Probability of each class prediction */,
  "prediction" INTEGER /* Final predicted class (0 or 1) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "actual_income" TEXT /* Actual income (for feedback and model improvement) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user regarding the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_predictions_id FOREIGN KEY ("id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclass_types" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work classification */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work classification */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the work classification */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for individuals in this work classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for individuals with this education level */,
  "employment_rate" TEXT /* Employment rate for individuals with this education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the occupation */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for individuals in this occupation */,
  "employment_rate" TEXT /* Employment rate for individuals in this occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for individuals with this marital status */,
  "employment_rate" TEXT /* Employment rate for individuals with this marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for individuals of this race */,
  "employment_rate" TEXT /* Employment rate for individuals of this race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income for individuals of this gender */,
  "employment_rate" TEXT /* Employment rate for individuals of this gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)
